# Omar's Auto-Reply Template
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# This file lives in the same Google Drive folder as Code.gs.
# Edit it anytime — changes take effect on the next card tap.
# No redeployment needed.
#
# Available placeholders:
#   {{NAME}}         — the person's first + last name
#   {{MEETING_LINE}} — auto-generated: "Great meeting you at [venue]."
#                      (falls back to "Great meeting you recently.")
#   {{VENUE}}        — just the venue/event name, if you need it standalone
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

Hi {{NAME}},

{{MEETING_LINE}}

I'd love to stay in touch — here are two easy ways to connect:

**[Schedule a 30-min call](https://share.islamicfamily.ca/oy30)** — find a time that works for you.

**[Connect on LinkedIn](https://linkedin.com/somaryaqub)** — let's stay in each other's orbit.

Looking forward to the conversation.

Omar Yaqub
Servant of Servant · IslamicFamily
Founder · Flourishing Systems
Edmonton · Treaty 6 · Amiskwaciwâskahikan
